description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build OSW-OS that runs on ubuntu-latest for Ubuntu and all models. The workflow triggers on workflow dispatch, push to non-markdown files and non-screen capture scripts, and pull requests to master and develop branches. It checks for duplicate actions, finds packages and matrices of languages and models, then builds OSW in a matrix of languages, models, and build configurations, caching pip and PlatformIO, and uploading firmware artifacts.
